description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named NestedText that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-11) and Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9) in parallel. For each job, check out the repository, set up the specified Python version, install NestedText using pip, and run tests with tox.
